titleStmt.title: SII 22.413: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 413. (A.R. No. 413 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚĪVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL RĀJARĀJA I—28th YEAR (A.D. 1012-13)

summary.p: This is also in Vaṭṭeḻuttu script and is mutilated. It seems to record an endowment of land by the nāṭṭār of Murappu-nāḍu in Rājarāja-maṇḍalam to the temple of Emberumāṉ at Teṉ-Tirumāliruñjōlai on the north bank of the [Taṇporu]ndam river to provide for the expenses of a big feast in the temple on the day following the day of asterism Uttirāḍam in Āḍi month and for burning lamps.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
c celviyum taṉakkey Urimaipūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūrcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭi
taṭiyapāṭium kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅka mum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamu
m tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāl koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻiuḷ Ellāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecu
koḷ śrī kovirājarājakecarivaṉmarāyiṉa śrī rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu Irācarācamaṇṭalattu murappunāṭṭu nāṭṭom
ntattiṉ vaṭakarai teṉtirumāliruñcolai Emperumāṉukku tiruvāṭi Uttirāṭamāyiṉa piṟṟaināḷ vaitta ti Āyiranāḻi Ariciyāl peruntiru
vamirtu ceyvitāka vaiyccu koṭutta pūmi kūṭalūr nilam taṭṭukālāl nir Iṟaiccu nilluvitevaṉ paṭakālc ceytiṭa nālu
laṉviḷakkum niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭutto murappunāṭṭu nāṭṭom Ippūmic can=tirātittaval Iññāḷāl ceyya Itai Ira
niroṭu Aṭṭivaiyccuk kuṭutto murappunāṭṭu nāṭṭom Ivai Araiyaṉ tevatataṉ Eḻuttu
teyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai taraṇikoṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.413 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
